typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Domain as string,
		DomainName as string,
		CutOff as string,
		Currency as string,
		CoA as string,
		Title as string,
		ProgressType as string,
		ContractNo as string,
		SummaryCostType as string,
		CostType as string,
		Unit as string,
		WorkArea as string,
		Prime as string,
		SubPrime as string,
		CostCode as string,
		Measurable as boolean,
		Phase as string,
		PSRLevel1 as string,
		PSRLevel2 as string,
		PSRL1Description as string,
		PSRL2Description as string,
		UoM as string,
		OBQty as string,
		OBHrs as string,
		OBAmt as string,
		OBRate as string,
		CBQty as string,
		CBHrs as string,
		CBAmt as string,
		PBQty as string,
		PBHrs as string,
		PBAmt as string,
		ActualHrs as string,
		ActualAmt as string,
		ActualRate as string,
		CommittedHrs as string,
		CommittedAmt as string,
		EarnedQty as string,
		EarnedHrs as string,
		EarnedAmt as string,
		TakeOffQty as string,
		TakeOffHrs as string,
		PctComplete as string,
		EACHrs as string,
		EACAmt as string,
		ETCHrs as string,
		ETCAmt as string,
		ETCRate as string,
		ApprovedEACQty as string,
		ApprovedEACHrs as string,
		ApprovedEACAmt as string,
		ApprovedETCHrs as string,
		ApprovedETCAmt as string,
		ForecastHrs as string,
		ForecastAmt as string,
		ForecastRate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_Onshore/MCPM_Onshore.csv']) ~> sourceMCPMOnshore
sourceMCPMOnshore derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_Onshore/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'MCPM_Onshore_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		Domain,
		DomainName,
		CutOff,
		Currency,
		CoA,
		Title,
		ProgressType,
		ContractNo,
		SummaryCostType,
		CostType,
		Unit,
		WorkArea,
		Prime,
		SubPrime,
		CostCode,
		Measurable,
		Phase,
		PSRLevel1,
		PSRLevel2,
		PSRL1Description,
		PSRL2Description,
		UoM,
		OBQty,
		OBHrs,
		OBAmt,
		OBRate,
		CBQty,
		CBHrs,
		CBAmt,
		PBQty,
		PBHrs,
		PBAmt,
		ActualHrs,
		ActualAmt,
		ActualRate,
		CommittedHrs,
		CommittedAmt,
		EarnedQty,
		EarnedHrs,
		EarnedAmt,
		TakeOffQty,
		TakeOffHrs,
		PctComplete,
		EACHrs,
		EACAmt,
		ETCHrs,
		ETCAmt,
		ETCRate,
		ApprovedEACQty,
		ApprovedEACHrs,
		ApprovedEACAmt,
		ApprovedETCHrs,
		ApprovedETCAmt,
		ForecastHrs,
		ForecastAmt,
		ForecastRate,
		FileName
	)) ~> snkMCPMOnshoreRaw
